              MODIFIED get-per-area-report-data.ts (+~155 LOC) — exported PerAreaReportFuelConsumption + PerAreaReportFuelMonthRow interfaces; fuelConsumption: PerAreaReportFuelConsumption | null field on PerAreaReportData; new buildFuelConsumption helper with monthly bucketing via tenantLocalMonthLabel + toFiniteNumber Decimal-decoder helper (coerces Prisma Decimal | number | string into finite number — supports plain-number test fixtures via duck-typed `.toNumber` check); Prisma fuelEntry.findMany scoped to (tenantId + areaBoundaryId + dateReceived gte/lt) with select on liters/totalPrice/currency/dateReceived ordered ASC; patrol.findMany select extended with startTime for monthly bucketing; SeabornePatrolBucketInput.startedAt widened to Date | null to match schema nullability (fix during typecheck); loop builds seabornePatrols from patrols where patrolType === "seaborne"; buildFuelConsumption returns null when BOTH fuel entries AND seaborne patrols are empty; averageLitersPerKm = totalSeabornePatrolKm > 0 ? totalLiters/totalSeabornePatrolKm : null (divide-by-zero guard); per-month litersPerKm follows the same guard per bucket; defensive Date-instance check on startedAt + dateReceived skips month bucketing when missing/invalid (production: Prisma always returns valid Dates; defense covers pre-6.2c test fixture compatibility); perMonthBreakdown sorted chronologically by YYYY-MM label; currency falls back to "PHP" when fuel-entry list is empty or first entry's currency is non-string.

              MODIFIED __tests__/get-per-area-report-data.test.ts (+5 net new vitest cases) — fuel sum across area+range yields correct totals + currency + entry count + L/km divides only by seaborne km (foot patrols excluded from divisor); divide-by-zero guard returns null averageLitersPerKm when only foot patrols exist; per-month bucketing groups fuel + seaborne km into chronologically-sorted YYYY-MM buckets across 3-month range with April fuel-only month showing N/A litersPerKm; null fuelConsumption returned when only foot patrols + no fuel entries; query scope assertion matches tenantId + areaBoundaryId + dateReceived window + correct select projection.
